caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing winds of 20 kt with wave heights reaching 4.5 ft, while San Juan is seeing slightly calmer conditions with winds at 17 kt. I expect the Eastern Caribbean to see increased rain probabilities, with St. Maarten having a 66% chance of precipitation, making for a wet day in these ports.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing westward dominant swells with wave heights reaching 5.9 ft and winds up to 18 kt, while Lisbon is seeing relatively calmer conditions with max winds of 13 kt. I expect a high chance of rain in both areas, with an 88% probability of precipitation in Cadiz, making for a wet and breezy day in the Western Mediterranean ports.
